metadata.note: KEPT against the initial instinct to drop it: 28 titles/180d, 25 of them exclusive to this bucket, recurring every month Jan-Jun 2026 (Yasukuni offering, looted-relics restitution, comfort-women denial, Nanjing denial, Guangdong war-crimes archives, restoring wartime military ranks). Not stale training data. Dyad gate centroid_ids={ASIA-CHINA} + primary_target=ASIA-JAPAN; the ASIA-JAPAN target is LOAD-BEARING here -- it is what keeps Korea-Japan comfort-women/textbook coverage out, since that vocabulary is shared. Generic nouns ('shrine', 'massacre', 'aggression', 'war crime') are safe only because of that gate. 'militaris*' is deliberately NOT here -- it lives on japan_defense_expansion; the history-inflected framing of it belongs in that FN's narrative framing_keywords. Real-gate audit CONFIRMED the gate carries the precision: 'aggression' is 5/5 'Japanese wartime aggression' (the Iran/Israel 'aggression' noise that made it look 60% foreign is gated out), and 'forced labor' drops from 11 Xinjiang/Section-301 hits to 0. DROPPED post-audit: 'apolog' -- 3/3 real hits were the embassy/Takaichi rupture ('demand Takaichi to apologize over embassy intrusion'), not historical apology; the evergreen concept stays reachable via wartime/war crime/aggression.
